<!--
The title of this pull request must be a correct commit message.
A maintainer squashes your commits into one commit, and the title becomes its
message.

  type(scope): subject

For example: fix(cli): stop the crash on exit

To see the allowed types, read VERSIONING.md.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- Tell us in one or two sentences. -->

## Why?

<!-- What problem does this repair? Give a link to the issue, if one exists. -->

## How did you test it?

<!-- Tell us the commands that you ran, or the steps that you followed. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The title of this pull request has the form `type(scope): subject`.
- [ ] `npm run version:check` passes.
- [ ] I added a test, or a test is not necessary.
- [ ] I used `!` or a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer, if my change breaks the
      behaviour of a user.
